benefits.description: Patella tendon 95% healed with barely any inflammation; bicep tear reduced from grade 2 to between acute trauma and grade 1. GP was amazed by progress.
Significant improvement in knee and tendon injuries; still some crepitus in knee but overall massive improvement
OP claims BPC157 has been proven to help stomach GI health

protocol_notes: Second course of oral BPC157 and TB500 from Direct Peptides. Initial injury from skydiving in October. Physiotherapy began ~6 weeks before first MRI in February. Second MRI done approximately 2+ months later showed significant healing. Was told 6 months from recovery at first MRI but achieved near-full healing sooner. Chose oral route to avoid injections despite lower bioavailability. Dose reported as 500mg of both twice per day — note: this is likely a reporting error (should probably be 500mcg), but recorded as stated.
